_note: MOCK procedure result for PT-003. Clinically coherent with referral: 5-year surveillance colonoscopy for prior 2 tubular adenomas, asymptomatic, average-to-slightly-elevated risk (single FDR colon cancer >60).

procedure.name: Colonoscopy
procedure.indication: Surveillance colonoscopy — history of 2 tubular adenomas (2021); asymptomatic
procedure.extent_reached: Cecum (confirmed by appendiceal orifice and ileocecal valve)

procedure_report: PROCEDURE: Colonoscopy. INDICATION: 5-year surveillance for prior 2 tubular adenomas (2021); patient asymptomatic. SEDATION: moderate (midazolam 2 mg, fentanyl 75 mcg). PREP: adequate (BBPS 8/9). Metformin was held on the day of prep and procedure per pre-procedure instructions; levothyroxine continued. FINDINGS: The colonoscope was advanced to the cecum with the appendiceal orifice and ileocecal valve identified; the terminal ileum was intubated and appeared normal. A 5 mm sessile polyp was identified in the ascending colon and removed by cold snare polypectomy; the specimen was retrieved and sent to pathology (specimen A). A 3 mm sessile polyp in the sigmoid colon was removed by cold forceps and retrieved (specimen B). No mass, no ulceration, and no active bleeding were seen. Scattered non-bleeding diverticula were noted in the sigmoid colon. IMPRESSION: Two small polyps removed on surveillance exam; sigmoid diverticulosis. Pathology pending. RECOMMENDATION: surveillance interval to be finalized once pathology returns.
disposition: Discharged home same day in stable condition with escort. Post-polypectomy precautions reviewed. Resumed metformin with next scheduled dose after resuming normal diet.

followup.recommendation: Review polyp pathology (specimens A and B); call patient with result and set surveillance interval based on histology and polyp count/size
Resume metformin 1000 mg BID with resumption of normal diet (held only for prep/procedure day)
Ensure problem list correction persists — 'Malignant tumor of colon' is FAMILY history (father, ~age 72), not a personal diagnosis; affects future risk stratification

planted_followup_items.description: Pathology pending for two retrieved polyps (ascending 5 mm, sigmoid 3 mm) — histology determines the surveillance interval and must be communicated to the patient
planted_followup_items.expected_action: review pathology, call patient with result, document next surveillance interval

planted_followup_items.description: Surveillance interval must be set once pathology returns; if tubular adenomas as in 2021, interval per guideline (single FDR colon cancer >60 is a modifier). Do not let this default/drop
planted_followup_items.expected_action: assign and document surveillance colonoscopy interval

planted_followup_items.description: Metformin was held only for prep/procedure day (not an anticoagulant/antiplatelet; nothing periprocedural was truly held to bridge); confirm the patient has resumed her home metformin 1000 mg BID after returning to normal diet and that no dose was missed
planted_followup_items.expected_action: confirm metformin 1000 mg BID resumed after normal diet; reconcile that no other home meds were interrupted

post_procedure_followup._note: Patient-reported stream after the procedure — the inbound signal the LeftBehind product triages. Each contact is labeled ground truth so triage can be scored.

contacts.verbatim: My throat feels a bit scratchy and I'm real gassy and crampy in my belly. Is that normal?
contacts.clinical_signal: Expected post-endoscopy sore throat plus insufflation-related bloating and mild cramping after a routine surveillance colonoscopy
contacts.expected_action: Reassure; scratchy throat, gas, and mild cramping are expected and self-limited over 24-48h. Walking and passing gas help. Return precautions for heavy bleeding, severe pain, or fever.
contacts.rationale: Common benign post-colonoscopy symptoms after air insufflation; no red flag, no escalation.

contacts.verbatim: I held my diabetes pill the day before and the day of the test like you said — am I okay to go back to taking it now that I'm eating normally?
contacts.clinical_signal: Diabetic patient asking about resuming metformin that was held only for prep/procedure day
contacts.expected_action: Confirm from the plan: metformin was held only for the prep/procedure day; resume metformin 1000 mg BID now that she is eating a normal diet. Reassure no bridging or other med changes needed.
contacts.rationale: Directly answerable from the med-reconciliation follow-up item; benign continuation-of-care question, no escalation.

contacts.verbatim: When will I hear back about the polyps you took out, and do I need another scope sooner because of my dad's colon cancer?
contacts.clinical_signal: Patient asking about pending pathology turnaround and how family history affects her surveillance interval
contacts.expected_action: Answer from the result: pathology pending (expected ~2026-08-11); the team will call with the result and set the surveillance interval based on histology and her single first-degree relative diagnosed after age 60. No action needed by the patient meanwhile.
contacts.rationale: Answerable from pending_pathology and surveillance_interval items; benign informational question, no escalation.
